privileged_info_summary: The task involves CAMEO Data Manager (v4.51) running on Windows 11. The existing facility 'Green Valley Water Facility' in Colchester, VT is a synthetic facility defined in epcra_tier2_data.xml containing Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) and Fluorosilic Acid (CAS 16961-83-4). The new facility 'Riverside Chemical Processing Plant' at 456 Industrial Boulevard, Burlington, VT 05401 (Chittenden County) is being added as a synthetic record. All geographic references (VT, Burlington, Chittenden County, ZIP 05401) are valid real locations.
